     The Numbers Business Report

Stuber (2019)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $22,370,452Details
International Box Office $10,020,493
Worldwide Box Office $32,390,945
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $906,035
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $1,294,214
Total $2,200,249
Further financial details...

Synopsis

When a mild-mannered Uber driver named Stu picks up a passenger who turns out to be a cop hot on the trail of a brutal killer, he’s thrust into a harrowing ordeal where he desperately tries to hold onto his wits, his life and his five-star rating.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$8,225,384 (36.8% of total gross)
Legs:2.72 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:69.1% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$16,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.0 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,050 opening theaters/3,050 max. theaters, 3.1 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $29,208,580

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: July 12th, 2019 (Wide) by 20th Century Fox
International Releases: July 11th, 2019 (Wide) (New Zealand)
July 12th, 2019 (Wide), released as Spolujízda (Czech Republic)
July 12th, 2019 (Wide), released as STUBER: DIVJA VOŽNJA (Slovenia)
July 12th, 2019 (Wide), released as Stuber: Detectiv de nevoie (Romania)
July 12th, 2019 (Wide), released as Ченге под наем (Bulgaria)
Video Release: October 1st, 2019 by Fox Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for violence and language throughout, some sexual references and brief graphic nudity.
(Rating bulletin 2581 (Cert #51977), 6/5/2019)
Running Time: 105 minutes
Geographical setting: Los Angeles
Plot point: Accidental Shooting, Artists, Buddy Cop, Car Accident, Car Chase, Corrupt Cops, Dysfunctional Family, Police Detective, Romance, Shootout, Surprise Twist, Taxi Driver, Unrequited Love
Social setting: LAPD
Subgenre: Action Comedy
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: 20th Century Fox, GoldDay Productions
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
